name: typescript-lang-project-harness
description: Project-level TypeScript language harness with native parser facts and compact diagnostics for agents

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && chmod +x dist/src/cli/main.js
scripts.test: npm run test:implementation && npm run test:policy
scripts.test:implementation: npm run build && find dist/tests -name "*.test.js" ! -name "self_policy.test.js" -print | xargs node --test
scripts.harness: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/main.js check --full .
